economics.title: Execution economics
economics.introPart3: . Premium is only triggered as a fallback. The numbers below are measured directly from real executions.
economics.savedDetail: {local} local resolutions × {cost} measured average premium cost per escalation.
economics.savedNote: Measured from real escalation costs (cost_usd from the stream). Premium-assisted resolutions are counted, with their assist cost discounted.
economics.noCostData: Not enough data yet: no premium escalation has a measured cost, so we can't compute savings honestly.
economics.counterfactualDetail: the premium would have spent on the same work ({label}).
economics.counterfactualNote: Estimate: tokens the Forge processed locally × reference price. Premium was never triggered, so there is no real charge — this is what you would have spent.
